question_title: Will the Cannes Film Festival publish its 2026 official selection before April 10, 2026?
summary: The Cannes Film Festival has never announced its official selection before April 10 in any recent year. Historical data from 2018-2025 shows announcements consistently between April 10-14. The earliest ever was April 10, 2025. For 2026, the official Cannes website explicitly states the announcement will be "mid-April." Film submissions close March 13, making a pre-April-10 announcement logistically implausible. This question should resolve NO with very high confidence.

factors.description: Historical precedent: In every year from 2018-2025, the official selection was announced between April 10-14. Never before April 10. The earliest was April 10, 2025 - right on the threshold, not before it.
Cannes 2026 programme page explicitly states the announcement will be 'mid-April in Paris' - confirming the standard timeline applies to 2026.
Film submission deadline is March 13, 2026. The selection committee needs ~4 weeks to review hundreds of submissions, making a pre-April 10 announcement logistically infeasible.
Small residual possibility of unprecedented early announcement (organizational restructuring, calendar shift, etc.) - no evidence supports this but acknowledging tail risk.

reasoning:
**Forecast: 3% (YES)**

The evidence overwhelmingly points to NO:

1. **Perfect historical track record**: In 8 recent years (2018-2025), Cannes has *never* announced the official selection before April 10. The earliest was exactly April 10, 2025.
2. **Official 2026 statement**: The Cannes programme page explicitly states the 2026 announcement will be in "mid-April" - consistent with the standard timeline.
3. **Logistical constraint**: Feature film submissions close March 13, 2026. The selection committee needs weeks to review, making a pre-April 10 announcement practically impossible.
4. **No signals of change**: There is zero reporting or indication that Cannes plans to accelerate its timeline for 2026.
sources_consulted: [(Metaculus) Will the Cannes Film Festival publish its 2026 official selection before April 10, 2026?](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/42240)
